text: What if testing could actually enhance your learning? The testing effect shows that retrieving information strengthens memory more than just re-reading. But how does it really work? Studies show testing creates stronger neural connections, making recall easier later. Retrieving info challenges your brain, leading to deeper understanding. It’s like a workout for your memory! So, next time you’re studying, consider testing yourself more often. It could boost your learning dramatically! Like this? Follow for more science insights!
